chapter_title.en: The Reward of one who Feeds a Believer, Quenches his Thirst, Clothes him or Pays off his Debt

parts.text: وعن أبي جعفر عليه السلام قال

text: : من أحب الخصال إلى الله عز وجل ثلاثة: مسلم أطعم مسلما من جوع، أو فك عنه كربة، أو قضى عنه دينا.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 167. It has been narrated that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said: (Amongst) the qualities most loved by Allah are three: a Muslim who feeds a hungry Muslim, relieves him from a distress or settle his debt for him.
